document with a preamble
.
\documentclass{book}

\usepackage[showframe]{geometry}
\usepackage{layout}
\usepackage{showframe}

\usepackage{textcomp}
\usepackage{calc}

\usepackage{luatextra}
\usepackage{lua-visual-debug}

%\setlength{\parskip}{8pt}

\setcounter{secnumdepth}{-1}

\setlength{\unitlength}{8pt}


\begin{document}
\end{document}
.
<div class="body"></div>
.


making titles
.
\documentclass{article}

\setcounter{secnumdepth}{2}

\title{The Title}
\author{Michael Brade}
\date{2026}


\begin{document}

\maketitle

\end{document}
.
<div class="body">
<div class="list center">
<span class="vspace" style="margin-bottom:2em"></span>
<div class="title">The Title</div>
<span class="vspace" style="margin-bottom:1.5em"></span>
<div class="author">Michael Brade</div>
<span class="vspace" style="margin-bottom:1em"></span>
<div class="date">2026</div>
<span class="vspace" style="margin-bottom:1.5em"></span>
</div>
</div>
.
